full_text:
Bo Cai 波才
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bo Cai (波才)was born in Yingchuan. Defeated Zhu Jun then lost to the combined armies of Zhu Jun, Huangfu Song and Cao Cao. Bo Cai was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Bo Cai lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographyInternet (Consistent)
Bo Cai was a Yellow Scarves commander. Early in the rebellion he commanded one of the largest divisions of Yellow Scarves. While he managed to defeat the army led by Zhu Jun, he was soon defeated and killed by the combined forces of Zhu Jun, Huangfu Song and Cao Cao.
